description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. The workflow should have two jobs, build_gcc and build_clang_san, both running on ubuntu-20.04. The build_gcc job should check out the repository with submodules, install g++-11, and run .travis-script.sh with gcc-11 and g++-11. The build_clang_san job should check out the repository with submodules, install clang-14 and g++-11, and run .travis-script.sh with clang-14 and clang++-14.
